_meta.description: High-quality real sample for YCE test fixtures. Exact pool from DefiLlama snapshot (data/snapshots/defillama-yield-latest.json, generated ~2026-05-16 via snapshot:defillama). Matches the proven aave-v3 USDT ethereum pool used in YCE-002 receipt validation (defillama-receipt-validation.md). poolId matches f981a304-bb6c-45b8-b0c5-fd2f515ad23a. evidenceClass=protocol_receipt_bound (from RECEIPT_BOUND_PROJECTS via protocol-readers). Used for adapter unit tests, normalizeDefiLlamaYieldPool, assessPool, policyGates (evidenceClass gate), receiptEvidence + loadYieldReceiptEvidence integration, YCE-003 shadowReady/liveReady gating.
_meta.notes: This is the normalized snapshot shape (input fields + family + evidenceClass attached by YCE-001). Call normalizeDefiLlamaYieldPool on it (or use directly in evaluate with cost defaults) to get apyBps etc. Pairs with synthetic/real yield receipts from receipt-reconciliation for entryExitProven tests. See receipt-validation.md Test 1 for realizedNetUsd 0.77 proof.
